---
title: "Synergy Screen: LBS007 x LRB | LBS007 x IRN"
output: html_document
---

# Setup 

```{r Setup, message = F}
set.seed(5014) 

# loading libraries 
library(synergyfinder)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(reshape2)
library(devtools)
library(knitr)
library(ggplot2)

# load functions 
devtools::load_all()

# loading data
r.list <- egi_read_abs("../data_raw/260616_Screen/", "DrugPrinter")
list2env(r.list, envir = environment())


prot <- read.csv("../data_raw/260616_Screen/260612_DrugPrinterProtocol.csv",
                 header = F, na.strings = "")

# prep data 
prot <- egi_read_prot(prot, 4, c("A673", "TC32", "RDES", "U2OS"))

# print examples 
kable(A673)
kable(head(prot))
```


# Percent Viability
```{r Calculate Percent Viability}
# set DMSO control for all plates (same protocol)
## and add in the zero well where neither drug is dispensed in the matrix
## for downstream analysis 
b1_dmso <- c(paste0(rep("M"), 3:10), paste0(rep("N"), 3:10))
b1_zero <- "L03"

b2_dmso <- c(paste0(rep("M"), 15:22), paste0(rep("N"), 15:22))
b2_zero <- "L15"

# A673 background 
a.bg <- as.vector(sapply(LETTERS[3:14], function(x) paste0(c(x), c(12,13))))

# TC32 background 
t.bg <- as.vector(sapply(LETTERS[3:14], function(x) paste0(c(x), c(12,13))))

# TC71 background 
r.bg <- as.vector(sapply(LETTERS[3:14], function(x) paste0(c(x), c(12,13))))

# U2OS background 
u.bg <- as.vector(sapply(LETTERS[3:14], function(x) paste0(c(x), c(12,13))))

# setup for apply 
## list plates
plates <- list(A673,
               TC32,
               RDES,
               U2OS)

## list background 
bgs <- list(a.bg,
            t.bg,
            r.bg,
            u.bg)

# run calcs 
pvs <- list()
for (i in seq_along(plates)){
  pvs[[i]] <- egi_percent_viability(plates[[i]], bgs[[i]], b1_dmso, b2_dmso)
}
```


# Data Wrangling: Align Percent Viability with Protocol 
```{r}
clines <- c("A673", "TC32", "RDES", "U2OS")

sf.data <- list()
for (i in seq_along(plates)){
 sf.data[[i]] <- egi_align_synergy(clines[i], pvs[[i]], prot, bgs[[i]],
                                   b1_zero, b2_zero)
}

# now, append them all into one df
a.full <- sf.data[[1]]
t.full <- sf.data[[2]]
r.full<- sf.data[[3]]
u.full <- sf.data[[4]]
```


# Processing 
```{r, echo = F}
#data reshaping and pre-processing
a.res <- ReshapeData(a.full, 
                   impute = T,
                   seed = 5014)

t.res <- ReshapeData(t.full,
                   impute = T,
                   seed = 5014)

r.res <- ReshapeData(r.full,
                   impute = T,
                   seed = 5014)

u.res <- ReshapeData(u.full,
                   impute = T,
                   seed = 5014)

res.list <- list(a.res, t.res, r.res, u.res)
```


# Synergy and Sensitiviy Analysis
```{r, echo = F}

for (i in seq_along(res.list)){
  res.list[[i]] <- CalculateSynergy(
    data = res.list[[i]],
    method = c("ZIP", "HSA", "Bliss", "Loewe"),
    Emin = NA,
    Emax = NA,
    correct_baseline = "non")
}
```



```{r, echo = F}
project <- "260616"
clines <- c("A673", "TC32", "RDES", "U2OS")
dcombos <- c("LRBxLBS", "IRNxLBS")
rlist <- res.list

egi_plot_this(project, clines, dcombos, rlist)
```
